_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in making decisions under conditions of uncertainty
reference_document_element_description: Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, including methodology selection, sensitivity analysis, and uncertainty quantification.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Task AB-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-A-001 (DA, cosine: 0.546), LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.520). Shared vocabulary: [decisions, uncertainty]. NICE-only terms [conditions, making, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyses, analysis, business, design, execute, high] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.891, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in making decisions under conditions of uncertainty" and "Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, inc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.549 ≈ STS 0.520 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [decisions, uncertainty] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [decisions, uncertainty]. NICE-only: [conditions, making, skill]. WIDAI-only: [analyses, analysis, business, design, execute, high].
